description: Pack of 4 fun Christmas novelty glasses to wear around the dinner table or for staff Xmas parties. Assorted designs - silver snowflake, green Xmas tree, yellow Xmas tree, reindeer. Great for Christmas staff parties or around the Christmas dinner table. Made from durable plastic. Amazing value for money! Fast 24-hour Royal Mail dispatch from our UK Warehouse.
